_comment: Manifest of Learning Atlas subjects. The hub home (index.html) renders its cards from this file, so adding a subject is a data change here — no HTML edits. status: 'live' links to href; 'soon' renders a disabled Coming-soon card.

subjects.name: History
subjects.description: Six conflicts from the French & Indian War to World War II — animated borders, battles, leaders and treaties on an interactive world map.

subjects.name: Biology
subjects.description: The living world in interactive diagrams — the cell, the human body, the tree of life and the rules of inheritance. Click to explore, quiz to learn.

subjects.name: Mathematics
subjects.description: Visual, interactive math — from the number line and geometry to functions and probability.

subjects.name: English
subjects.description: Language and literature — grammar, rhetoric, poetic form and the stories that shaped them.

subjects.name: Chemistry
subjects.description: An interactive periodic table, bonding, reactions and the states of matter.

subjects.name: Geography
subjects.description: Physical and human geography — climate, tectonics, biomes and the shape of nations.
